case_title: LYNN HOLMES VS. PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLMES, LYNN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS $474.04 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $474.04, MATTER DISMISSED AS TO DOES 1 TO 3 WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "GRANTED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DOES 1 TO BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-01-2011 AT 8:30AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-01-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $760.00 FILED BY HOLMES, LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS DOES 1 TO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID HUARD FILED BY HOLMES, LYNN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
